scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm run dev -w apps/frontend
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env PORT=3001 npm run start:dev -w apps/backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/frontend && npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/frontend && npm run lint -w apps/backend
